name: Cybrid Technologies Inc.
summary: Cybrid Technologies Inc. manufactures and sells thin film polymer functional materials in China. Its products include solar module backsheets, solar encapsulant films, insulation patches, repairing tapes, positioning tapes, C type high temperature products, single sided framing adhesive tapes, tapes for mobile graphite sheet heat dissipation, black shading PET double-sided tapes, protective films, tapes for speakers, dicing tapes, thin double side cotton tapes, insulation tapes, thermal conductive pads, electronic conductive tapes, and stiffener tapes. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Suzhou, China.
